title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Turning Point
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #14, Unknown person #16, Dadan, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #23, Unknown person #24 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #14, Unknown person #16, Dadan, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #23, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: turning point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It may be hard right now, Luffy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But you must silence those thoughts!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So ask yourself this!! What is there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I still have... All of you!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Unknown person #14, Unknown person #16, Dadan, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #23, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: turning point.
